human_approval.reason: No human reviewer or approval mechanism is available in this execution environment. Automated agent review is not human approval.

findings.description: Ignored Genkit spans with OTel enabled permanently set preserveOtelContext on an ambient user-owned Datadog span. ContextManager.active later honors that stale marker, so a completed ignored Genkit operation can alter unrelated OTel context resolution for the remainder of the user span.
findings.required_fix: Scope preservation to the Genkit operation store or restore it deterministically; add an ignored-operation marker-lifetime regression.

reviewed_areas: APM lifecycle, tags, errors, streaming, and parenting
LLMObs five-kind semantics, metrics, provider ownership, and privacy
OTel scope suppression and user OTel child behavior
types, docs, fixtures, configuration, and CI registration
stage_30_handoff: Do not finalize until GENKIT-HUMAN-001 is fixed and actual human approval is supplied or explicitly waived/replaced by the workflow owner.
